newContent.content:
trigger: none
pr: none

pool:
  vmImage: ubuntu-latest

steps:
  - bash: |
      echo "ado-helper smoke started"
      echo "branch=$(Build.SourceBranch)"
      echo "smoke=$(smoke)"
      echo "environment=$(environment)"
      for i in 1 2 3 4 5; do
        echo "log-line-$i"
        sleep 5
      done
    displayName: "Print dummy logs"
